rationale: An LLM at this capability ceiling (basic pattern-matching, textbook exploit generation) provides minimal benefit at the Execution phase where OC3 actors already possess sophisticated LOTL and evasion expertise that exceeds the LLM's capabilities. The LLM cannot reason about modern EDR bypass, adapt to defenses in real-time, or debug complex execution failures, limiting its value to minor time savings on basic scripting tasks that OC3 can already perform efficiently.
